metadata.title: Quick Side Peek Snags Two Clean Kills in VALORANT Mid Fight
metadata.description:
Check out this sharp side peek where timing and aim do all the work. Perfect example of how positioning can win a tight 2v1.
Where do you like to hold for quick picks?
